name: NameScan
description: NameScan provides a RESTful API and SaaS platform for PEP, sanctions and adverse media screening. Its aimed at regulated businesses needing quick AML integration with thorough documentation and global watchlist coverage.

seo.title: NameScan — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: NameScan: NameScan provides a RESTful API and SaaS platform for PEP, sanctions and adverse media screening. Its aimed at regulated businesses needing quick AML

when_to_use: PEP and sanctions screening API for AML onboarding flows
Adverse media check for enhanced customer due diligence
Batch screening for existing customer base remediation
Ongoing monitoring subscription for watchlist change alerts
Developer-friendly REST API for compliance team integrations

pros: RESTful API plus SaaS dashboard for flexibility
PEP, sanctions and adverse media in one call
Global watchlist coverage suitable for AML
cons: Australian origin, US recognition slightly weaker
Smaller brand than WorldCheck or Dow Jones
Adverse media coverage depth varies by region
Pricing tiers can cap high-volume users
review.verdict: Developer-friendly AML screening with honest docs; a reasonable default outside tier-1 bank deals.
review.best_for: Regulated SMBs and fintechs that want quick AML integration with transparent documentation
review.not_for: Global banks whose audit teams insist on WorldCheck or Dow Jones as the data source

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down

lock_in.reason: REST API, screening data portable via exports

developer_experience.reason: Good API docs, clear AML integration guide
